title: Enable vendor checks in Travis
body: It required some cleanups and preparation commits that I tried to break into small chunks to ease reviewing.

comments.body: If everything works as expected, I will add documentation on top :) @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

> If everything works as expected, I will add documentation on top :)

@TomSweeneyRedHat, in which document shall I put the explanation of how we do vendoring? I'd copy the one from https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/install.md#vendoring---dependency-management

:pushpin: Commit 1314341 has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat 1314341d7bb805f123d76e8b032cadb2ab4409f4 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.

@vrothberg I'd vote for dropping the vendor information into the Buildah install.md also, I'll add it just before the Configuration Files section (https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/install.md#configuration-files)
And thanks for putting this together!
Ooops, "I'll add it" was supposed to be "I'd add it".  If you want me to do so, I can add it.
Sounds good! I will wrap up a PR tomorrow. It's pub time now in my timezone :^)
